scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c cyan,violet "npm run dev -w client" "npm run dev -w server"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n client,server,hermes -c cyan,violet,green "npm run dev -w client" "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev:hermes -w server"
scripts.build: npm run build -w db && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
